title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi-4, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama—chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage local models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node ≥ 18, Deno, and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration layer exposing Ollama models as LangChain LLMs, chat, and embedding endpoints.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-like) with multi-user support, model management, and RAG plugins.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama offering sync/async APIs, model pulling, and chat completion streaming.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama—simple interface to chat, generate, and manage local LLMs.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based CLI that wraps Ollama with fuzzy finder, conversation history, and shell integration.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into the editor as an inline coding assistant.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in production-grade NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for deploying, fine-tuning, and integrating Ollama with Flask, Next.js, Ray, and more.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models through slash commands.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for running Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim client for Ollama featuring async HTTP, streams, and native Nim datatypes for chat and generate endpoints.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for reproducible LLM tests.

title: ollama-go-generate
summary: Official Go client library for Ollama with context-aware chat loops and embedding support.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds a /ollama slash command to query local models with thread history and role mentions.

title: ollama-powershell
summary: PowerShell module wrapping Ollama REST API for Windows admins who want to script local LLM workflows.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async/tokio bindings to Ollama’s chat, generate, and embedding endpoints.

title: ollama-model-registry
summary: Official registry of ready-to-run Modelfiles for Llama, Mistral, CodeLlama, Phi, Gemma, and more.
